intro: Real Shinkansen bullet trains — now collectible cards! Pull gacha, trade on the market, ride the price swings. 50 cards featuring real Shinkansen photographs.
description:
Real Shinkansen Photos on Every Card This game features 50 unique cards showcasing real photographs of Tokaido and Sanyo Shinkansen bullet trains. From the cutting-edge N700S to the classic 0 Series that started it all, and even the legendary Doctor Yellow Type 923 T4 — retired in 2025 — build your ultimate Shinkansen collection. 

■ Pull Gacha to Collect Cards Spin the gacha to get new Shinkansen cards! Each train appears in multiple versions with different rarities and unique titles. Display your collection in your personal showcase and aim for 100% completion. 

■ A Market That Moves This isn't just a gacha game. A full card trading market lets you buy and sell cards at fluctuating prices. Watch for sudden booms and crashes — sell high for a big profit, or swoop in during a crash to grab rare cards at a bargain. 

■ The Gacha–Trade Loop Spend your trading profits on more gacha pulls. Some cards can only be purchased on the market after you've pulled them from the gacha at least once — so both gacha and trading are essential to complete your collection. 

■ No Microtransactions There are absolutely no in-app purchases. Everything is earned through in-game currency. Buy the game and enjoy the full experience. Born from a passion to preserve these legendary trains in a game — whether you're a Shinkansen fan or a gacha enthusiast, there's something here for you.

Approved by Central Japan Railway Company / Approved by West Japan Railway Company
